post.description: Start a chunked upload session. Returns an opaque upload_id.

put.description:
Upload a single chunk of a file. Body is raw binary.

No per-request auth: the cryptographic upload_id (256-bit
``secrets.token_urlsafe``) acts as a bearer token.  Ownership is
verified when the session is finalized in ``complete_chunked_upload``.

post.description: Assemble chunks and process the ZIP.

Album.title: Album
Album.description: Full DB row. Only adds media - no relationships.

PrintBundle.title: PrintBundle
PrintBundle.description: Everything needed for PDF rendering in one response.

SegmentOutline.title: SegmentOutline
SegmentOutline.description: Lightweight segment projection - no points or route.
